title: Gascon

'''Gascon''' was a wealthy and powerful [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Trans-Gascon sector/Legends|Trans-Gascon sector]]. [[Monarchy/Legends|Ruled]] by a [[Unidentified King of Gascon|king]] and [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Marilla]], following the formation of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], Gascon remained neutral yet strategically important during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the New Republic and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. At one point, the pro–New Republic Marilla, who had given a unique [[Marilla's ring|ring]] as a gift to her lover, the [[Prime Minister (Demigue)|Prime Minister]] of the planet [[Demigue]], tasked a group of individuals with retrieving the [[Ring/Legends|ring]] in [[Time/Legends|time]] for a ball given by Gascon's [[King/Legends|king]] so that her affair would not be exposed.

==Description==
Gascon was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Envoy" /> located in the [[Gascon system/Legends|Gascon system]], a part of the [[Trans-Gascon sector/Legends|Trans-Gascon sector]]<ref name="EAOC" /> in the [[Trans-Hydian/Legends|Trans-Hydian]] portion of<ref name="Trans-Hydian" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="EAOC" /> One [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] the planet was situated on, the [[Demigue Terror]], linked it to the distant<ref name="Envoy" /> [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]<ref name="EAOC Demigue">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Demigue system/Legends|Demigue system]]</ref> planet [[Demigue]]. The terrestrial Gascon was an excellent source of a specific type of resource.<ref name="Envoy" />

==History==
Following the formation of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]<ref name="Envoy" /> in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> Gascon was neutral in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the New Republic and the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] but had vital importance to both sides of the conflict due to the planet's strategic location on [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] routes, its wealth and natural resources, and its excellent sites for military bases. At the [[Time/Legends|time]], a grassroots pro–New Republic movement emerged on the planet, with Gascon's [[Queen/Legends|Queen]] [[Marilla]] also favoring the Republic's cause, and the New Republic felt ready to attempt to convince the planet's government to formally ally with it.<ref name="Envoy" />

{{RPG|"[[Envoy to the Queen]]"}}
A group of individuals eventually visited Gascon. Queen Marilla tasked the group with [[Mission to Demigue|traveling]] to Demigue and retrieve a unique, valuable [[Marilla's ring|ring]] from the planet's [[Prime Minister (Demigue)|Prime Minister]]. Marilla had given the [[Ring/Legends|ring]] as a gift to the [[Prime Minister/Legends|Prime Minister]], with whom she had an affair. However, Gascon's [[Unidentified King of Gascon|king]], who had originally gifted the ring to the [[Gender/Legends|queen]], had announced a ball, in which the queen's infidelity would come to light unless the ring was brought back from Demigue in time for the event, which was to be held in one [[Standard week/Legends|week]].<ref name="Envoy" />

Given the time restraint for their task, the individuals were forced to travel the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]-infested Demigue Terror. The Gascon [[King/Legends|king's]] pro–Empire [[Unidentified Holy Advisor|Holy Advisor]], who sought to ruin Marilla, learned of the mission to Demigue and dispatched numerous [[Spy/Legends|spies]] and cutthroats after the queen's agents.<ref name="Envoy" />
{{Endgame}}

==Inhabitants==
Gascon was a powerful, independent, and wealthy world that did not fear pacification by the Galactic Empire. The planet was governed by a [[Monarchy/Legends|monarchy]], embodied by a king and his queen following the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]<ref name="Envoy" /> of 4 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]].<ref name="NEC" /> The king's [[Holy Advisor]] represented Gascon's powerful [[Akol]] religion.<ref name="Envoy" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gascon was created by [[Bill Olmesdahl]] as one of the settings for "[[Envoy to the Queen]]," a [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] adventure hook published in the [[1992]] supplement ''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Screen]]'' for use with [[West End Games]]' ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''. "Envoy to the Queen" suggests that the player characters can either be dispatched to the planet as New Republic [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomats]] or contacted by Queen Marilla's servants and recruited as guardians of the monarch.<ref name="Envoy" />

In addition, the scenario provides several possible reasons for Gascon's strategic importance during the Galactic Civil War. Since they do not contradict each other, this article assumes all of the suggested reasons apply to the planet.<ref name="Envoy" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Gascon [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Gascon itself, in grid square P-8.<ref name="TEA" />
